title: Datadog (DDOG) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Datadog Q3 2023 Earnings Beat Estimates. Financial Results: Third quarter revenue grew 25 percent year-over-year to 548 million. The company's net revenues of 547.5 million increased 25.4 percent year over year which beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenues of 523 million. Earnings Performance: Datadog reported third-quarter 2023 non-GAAP earnings per share of 45 cents which beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 34 cents and increased 95.7 percent from the year-ago quarter. Profitability Metrics: Gross profit in the quarter was 451 million representing a gross margin of 82.3 percent which compares to a gross margin of 81.3 percent last quarter and 79.7 percent in the year-ago quarter. Q3 operating income was 131 million for a 24 percent operating margin up from 21 percent last quarter and above the 17 percent in the year-ago quarter. Customer Metrics: Strong growth of larger customers with about 3,130 100k plus ARR customers up from about 2,600 a year ago. 82 percent of customers used two or more products up from 80 percent in the year-ago quarter. 46 percent of customers utilized four or more products up from 40 percent. Forward Guidance: For the fourth quarter of 2023 Datadog anticipates revenues between 564 and 568 million with non-GAAP earnings expected in the range of 42-44 cents per share.
